abilities.name: Rise in Peace
abilities.text:
You can choose not to deploy Head Stone at the start of the game. If you do, they gain the [[kw:late-arrival|Late Arrival]] special rule.

At the start of your turn, you can spend 2 Energy. Set up a Head Stone in Late Arrival anywhere on the table more than 1" away from enemy monsters. You must then immediately activate that Head Stone.

Whenever a monster is destroyed, before removing them from the table, you can spend 1 Energy. Set up a Head Stone in Late Arrival anywhere in base contact with them, then remove the destroyed monster from the table.
